calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-436 drive-coupling retest on the SD-049-PHASE-2 kappa-scale + standing differential-depletion substrate (514r successor)
items.note: 514r-successor MECH-436 retest on the landed SD-049-PHASE-2 drive-coupling amend (kappa_scale=6.0 + WL-scoring-env partial restoration 0.3 + divergent decay). LOAD-BEARING PASS = natural drive-coupled delta mean(WL_drive-WL_nodrive) >= max(k*pstdev,0.15) on >=2/3 seeds -> MECH-436 substrate_ceiling->supports. NEW enriched-spread non-vacuity precondition (in-run drive_spread_max >= 0.10) + 514r overshoot/OFF/argmax-relevance readiness gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a false weakens. MECH-229 leg (a) untouched. Re-applied DB-authoritatively after a concurrent queue-conflict rebase.

items.title: MECH-044 hippocampal relational binding vs ablation (detect spatial relation changes)
items.note: Proposal EXP-0184. Tests whether hippocampal anchor system (MECH-269, SD-039) detects RELATIONAL changes (entity positions swap) vs ABSOLUTE changes (both entities shift preserving relation). 3 arms x 3 seeds x 30 trials. Criteria: relational_sensitivity >= 0.5, ablation margin >= 0.3, anchor resets on relational change > 0.
